text:
For your Wix site, you can add the FlowBlinq schema injection code by following these steps:

1. **Go to your Wix Editor**: Open your Wix site in the editor.
2. **Access the Code Panel**: Click on the "Dev Mode" option at the top of the editor to enable the Code Panel.
3. **Add the Code**: In the Code Panel, you can insert the schema code into the appropriate section of your site. Typically, this would be in the "Site Code" section or on specific pages where you want the schema to apply.
4. **Publish Your Site**: After adding the code, make sure to publish your site to apply the changes.

If you have the schema code ready from the Setup tab, just copy and paste it into the Code Panel as instructed. Let me know if you need any more help!
